# Scraper HTML Fixtures (002)

Offline HTML/JSON samples for unit tests. One file per source:

| File | Source slug |
|------|-------------|
| `timepad_sample.html` | timepad |
| `mts_live_sample.html` | mts_live |
| `mos_sport_rayon_sample.html` | mos_sport_rayon |

| `mos_kultura_sample.html` | mos_kultura |
| `mtpp_sample.html` | mtpp |

Do not commit live scraped pages with personal data. Keep samples minimal.
